evidence_quotes.quote: protections for video games, to prevent them from being destroyed forever.

paragraphs.text: This is a great step for the European Union. For too long massive companies have dominated the marketplace by using unfair and even harmful practices! I hope that the EU will continue to protect the rights of consumers. On that topic, there is another issue I and many people are passionate and concerned about, that being the right of people sold a game as a product to have access to it. In case you aren't aware, a huge movement getting over 1.4 million signatures in the EU citizens' initiative that aims to protect people's rights to own the games that they purchase. This is not just a want of people who want to keep playing, this is a movement of preservation of culture, which more and more is becoming digital. I would therefore if it would be possible for the digital fairness act to also include protections for video games, to prevent them from being destroyed forever. Thank you!
